---
title: ""
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

::: {.hero-section}
::: {.hero-content}
## Jorge Homero Márquez Taffo
### GIS & Environmental Data Specialist

Geospatial analyst and environmental consultant with 19 years of experience
in biodiversity data, remote sensing, and spatial modeling across Chilean
ecosystems. Specialized in connecting GIS workflows with machine learning
for conservation science.

::: {.hero-buttons}
[View Projects](projects.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
[Download CV](assets/cv_homero.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-secondary}
:::
:::
::: {.hero-image}
![](assets/profile.jpg){.profile-photo}
:::
:::

---

::: {.skills-section}
## Core skills

::: {.skills-grid}
::: {.skill-card}
### 🗺 Spatial Analysis
ArcGIS Pro · QGIS · Google Earth Engine · PostGIS · Remote Sensing
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### 🤖 Data Science & ML
Python · R · Computer Vision · Species Distribution Modeling · Deep Learning
:::

::: {.skill-card}
### 🌿 Environmental Domain
Biodiversity Assessment · EIA · Forest Monitoring · Mining Impact Analysis
:::
:::
:::

---

::: {.featured-section}
## Featured projects

::: {.project-grid}
### [Predicción de atropellos de fauna](projects/prediccion_fauna_impactada.qmd)
Descripción breve del proyecto.

### [ReconSP](projects/reconsp.qmd)
Descripción breve.
:::
:::
